items.Agenda_Topic: 91 Watervale Road, Case#(ZON26-000004). Applicants Patricia Wilder and Paulo Wilder for an Administrative Appeal of a Notice of Violation regarding the operation of business at 91 Watervale Road which is not allowed use in a Single Family Two Zoning District per the City of Medford Zoning Ordinance.

items.Location: Remote via Zoom
items.Agenda_Topic: 64 Boynton Road, Case#(ZON26-000008). Applicants Stuart Peloquin and Jessica Willhoft to build an addition at 64 Boynton Road within the Rear Yard Setback which is not allowed per the City of Medford Zoning Ordinance, Chapter 94, Table B – Table of Dimensional Requirements.

items.Location: Remote via Zoom
items.Agenda_Topic: 41 Yale Street, Case#(ZON26-000009&10). Applicants Rebecca Schrot and John Halpin to allow the recently constructed addition at 41 Yale Street which will require a Special Permit to alter and extend the pre-existing, nonconforming side yard setbacks, per the City of Medford Zoning Ordinance, Section 94-5.3.1.1 and require a Variance for adding creating a third story at 141 Walsh Street which is not allowed per the City of Medford Zoning Ordinance, Chapter 94, Table B - Table of Dimensional Requirements 1 (b).

items.Location: Remote via Zoom
items.Agenda_Topic: 9 Sturges Street, Case#(ZON26-000012). Applicant and Owner, Mary Lee to build an addition at 9 Sturges Street which will extend an existing non-conforming structure thus requiring a Special Permit per the City of Medford Zoning Ordinance, Chapter 94-5.3.1.1.
